outcome: Mean change from baseline in symptom scores at 4 weeks
source_quote: In the MiBoFlo group, the OSDI score decreased from 44.31 +/- 1.03 at baseline to 34.00 +/- 13.84 at 1 month (p < 0.01)... In the LipiFlow group, the OSDI score decreased from 46.10 +/- 17.70 at baseline to 33.28 +/- 21.41 at 1 month (p < 0.001)

outcome: Mean change from baseline in meibum quality scores at 4 weeks—SMD
source_quote: In the MiBoFlo group, the MGS score decreased from 9.20 +/- 3.70 at baseline to 7.18 +/- 2.86 at 1 month (p > 0.05), and to 4.86 +/- 2.18 at 2 months (p < 0.001) vs. from 10.98 +/- 3.78 at baseline to 8.00 +/- 2.09 at 1 month (p < 0.001)

outcome: Proportion of eyes with retinal displacement within 3 months
source_quote: The retinal shift on fundus autofluorescence imaging (FAF) showed retinal displacement in 17 patients (34%)... Log roll: 12 (46.2%) with rotation; Lie flat: 5 (20.8%) with rotation. Fisher's test p = 0.94

outcome: CRF at 12 weeks or less after the intervention
source_quote: HIIT significantly improved CRF [adjusted between-group mean difference = 4.4; 95% CI, 1.5-7.3; p = 0.003]

outcome: QoL at 12 weeks or less after the intervention
source_quote: MCS: Adj. Mean between-group difference 3.9 (95% CI 0.3 to 7.5), p = 0.034. Exercise group post-intervention mean 50.4 (SD 6.3), Control group post-intervention mean 47.3 (SD 9.3)
Anxiety: adjusted between-group mean difference = -1.6 (95% CI -3.9 to 0.8), p = 0.19. Exercise group post-intervention mean 16.9 (SD 4.2), Control group mean 17.4 (SD 5.9)
